message:
feat(reactor): complete LabReactor Reactor trait implementation

Enhances LabReactor with missing acceptance criteria:
- deregister() now cleans up scheduled events for the deregistered token
- Add IoDriver integration tests verifying waker dispatch works correctly
- Add test for scheduled event cleanup on deregister

Waker dispatch is handled by the IoDriver layer (correct architecture
separation), and the new integration tests verify the full flow:
LabReactor → IoDriver → waker dispatch.

Closes: asupersync-aewx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
